en: In the fourth year of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah, king of Judah, this word came to Jeremiah from the LORD:
zh: 猶大王約西亞的兒子約雅敬第四年，耶和華那裡有這話臨到耶利米，說：

en: "Take a scroll and write on it all the words that I have spoken to you against Israel and Judah and all the nations, from the day I spoke to you, from the days of Josiah until today.
zh: “你取一卷書卷來，在上面寫下我在約西亞作王的時候開始，直到今日，對你所說論到以色列和猶大，以及列國的一切話。

en: It may be that the house of Judah will hear all the disaster that I intend to do to them, so that every one may turn from his evil way, and that I may forgive their iniquity and their sin."
zh: 或者猶大家聽見我想要降給他們的一切災禍，各人就回轉，離開自己的惡道，我就赦免他們的罪孽和罪惡。”

en: Then Jeremiah called Baruch the son of Neriah, and Baruch wrote on a scroll at the dictation of Jeremiah all the words of the LORD that he had spoken to him.
zh: 於是耶利米把尼利亞的兒子巴錄叫了來，巴錄就從耶利米口中，把耶和華向耶利米所說的一切話，都寫在書卷上。

en: And Jeremiah ordered Baruch, saying, "I am banned from going to the house of the LORD,
zh: 耶利米吩咐巴錄說：“我被阻止，不能進耶和華的殿裡去。

en: so you are to go, and on a day of fasting in the hearing of all the people in the LORD's house you shall read the words of the LORD from the scroll that you have written at my dictation. You shall read them also in the hearing of all the men of Judah who come out of their cities.
zh: 所以你要進去，趁禁食的日子，在耶和華的殿裡，向眾人宣讀書卷上的話，就是你從我口中所錄下耶和華的話。你要向從猶大各城來的人宣讀。

en: It may be that their plea for mercy will come before the LORD, and that every one will turn from his evil way, for great is the anger and wrath that the LORD has pronounced against this people."
zh: 也許他們會向耶和華懇求，各人回轉，離開自己的惡道，因為耶和華向這人民所說要發的怒氣和烈怒是很大的。”

en: And Baruch the son of Neriah did all that Jeremiah the prophet ordered him about reading from the scroll the words of the LORD in the LORD's house.
zh: 尼利亞的兒子巴錄就照著耶利米先知吩咐的一切去行，在耶和華的殿裡宣讀書上耶和華的話。

en: In the fifth year of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah, king of Judah, in the ninth month, all the people in Jerusalem and all the people who came from the cities of Judah to Jerusalem proclaimed a fast before the LORD.
zh: 猶大王約西亞的兒子約雅敬第五年九月，耶路撒冷的眾民，和所有從猶大各城來到耶路撒冷的人民，都在耶和華面前宣告禁食。

en: Then, in the hearing of all the people, Baruch read the words of Jeremiah from the scroll, in the house of the LORD, in the chamber of Gemariah the son of Shaphan the secretary, which was in the upper court, at the entry of the New Gate of the LORD's house.
zh: 巴錄就在耶和華的殿裡，向眾民宣讀書上耶利米的話。那時他是在沙番的兒子書記基瑪利雅的房間裡，這房間是在上院，靠近耶和華殿裡新門的入口。

en: When Micaiah the son of Gemariah, son of Shaphan, heard all the words of the LORD from the scroll,
zh: 沙番的孫子基瑪利雅的兒子米該亞，聽見了書上耶和華的一切話，

en: he went down to the king's house, into the secretary's chamber, and all the officials were sitting there: Elishama the secretary, Delaiah the son of Shemaiah, Elnathan the son of Achbor, Gemariah the son of Shaphan, Zedekiah the son of Hananiah, and all the officials.
zh: 就下到王宮，進入書記的房間裡；所有領袖都在那裡坐著，他們是書記以利沙瑪、示瑪雅的兒子第萊雅、亞革波的兒子以利拿單、沙番的兒子基瑪利雅、哈拿尼雅的兒子西底家和所有其餘的領袖。

en: And Micaiah told them all the words that he had heard, when Baruch read the scroll in the hearing of the people.
zh: 米該亞就把所聽見的一切都告訴他們，就是巴錄向眾人宣讀那書的時候，他所聽見的。

en: Then all the officials sent Jehudi the son of Nethaniah, son of Shelemiah, son of Cushi, to say to Baruch, "Take in your hand the scroll that you read in the hearing of the people, and come." So Baruch the son of Neriah took the scroll in his hand and came to them.
zh: 於是所有的領袖差派古示的曾孫、示利米雅的孫子、尼探雅的兒子猶底，去見巴錄，說：“請你把向眾人宣讀的那書卷親自拿來。”尼利亞的兒子巴錄就把書卷親自帶到他們那裡。

en: And they said to him, "Sit down and read it." So Baruch read it to them.
zh: 他們對他說：“請坐下，念給我們聽。”巴錄就向他們宣讀。

en: When they heard all the words, they turned one to another in fear. And they said to Baruch, "We must report all these words to the king."
zh: 他們聽見這一切話，就驚懼起來，面面相覷，對巴錄說：“我們必須把這一切話稟告王。”

en: Then they asked Baruch, "Tell us, please, how did you write all these words? Was it at his dictation?"
zh: 他們向巴錄說：“請告訴我們，你怎樣寫下這一切話，是耶利米親口說的嗎？”

en: Baruch answered them, "He dictated all these words to me, while I wrote them with ink on the scroll."
zh: 巴錄對他們說：“這一切話是他親口向我講述的，我就用墨寫在書上。”

en: Then the officials said to Baruch, "Go and hide, you and Jeremiah, and let no one know where you are."
zh: 眾領袖對巴錄說：“你和耶利米都要去躲藏起來；不要給人知道你們在甚麼地方。”

en: So they went into the court to the king, having put the scroll in the chamber of Elishama the secretary, and they reported all the words to the king.
zh: 眾領袖把書卷存在書記以利沙瑪的房間裡，然後進內院去見王，把這一切話都稟告給王聽。

en: Then the king sent Jehudi to get the scroll, and he took it from the chamber of Elishama the secretary. And Jehudi read it to the king and all the officials who stood beside the king.
zh: 於是王差派猶底去把書卷拿來；猶底就從書記以利沙瑪的房間裡把書卷取來，向王和所有侍立在王左右的領袖宣讀。

en: It was the ninth month, and the king was sitting in the winter house, and there was a fire burning in the fire pot before him.
zh: 那時正是九月，王坐在冬宮裡，在他面前有一盆炭火燒著。

en: As Jehudi read three or four columns, the king would cut them off with a knife and throw them into the fire in the fire pot, until the entire scroll was consumed in the fire that was in the fire pot.
zh: 每逢猶底宣讀完三四段，王就用書記的小刀把書割破，丟進盆中的火裡，直到全卷都在盆中的火裡燒盡了。

en: Yet neither the king nor any of his servants who heard all these words was afraid, nor did they tear their garments.
zh: 王和他所有聽見這一切話的臣僕，都不驚懼，也不撕裂衣服。

en: Even when Elnathan and Delaiah and Gemariah urged the king not to burn the scroll, he would not listen to them.
zh: 雖然以利拿單、第萊雅和基瑪利雅懇求王不要燒這書卷，王卻不聽他們，

en: And the king commanded Jerahmeel the king's son and Seraiah the son of Azriel and Shelemiah the son of Abdeel to seize Baruch the secretary and Jeremiah the prophet, but the LORD hid them.
zh: 更吩咐王子耶拉篾、亞次列的兒子西萊雅和亞伯疊的兒子示利米雅，去捉拿文士巴錄和耶利米先知；但耶和華把他們隱藏起來。

en: Now after the king had burned the scroll with the words that Baruch wrote at Jeremiah's dictation, the word of the LORD came to Jeremiah:
zh: 王燒了那載有巴錄從耶利米口中錄下的話的書卷以後，耶和華的話又臨到耶利米，說：

en: "Take another scroll and write on it all the former words that were in the first scroll, which Jehoiakim the king of Judah has burned.
zh: “你再取一書卷來，把猶大王約雅敬燒掉的前一書卷裡原來的一切話，都寫在書卷上面。

en: And concerning Jehoiakim king of Judah you shall say, 'Thus says the LORD, You have burned this scroll, saying, "Why have you written in it that the king of Babylon will certainly come and destroy this land, and will cut off from it man and beast?"
zh: 論到猶大王約雅敬你要說：‘耶和華這樣說：你燒了那書卷，說：你為甚麼在上面寫著說：巴比倫王一定來，毀滅這地，使地上的人畜都滅絕呢？

en: Therefore thus says the LORD concerning Jehoiakim king of Judah: He shall have none to sit on the throne of David, and his dead body shall be cast out to the heat by day and the frost by night.
zh: 因此，耶和華論到猶大王約雅敬這樣說：他的後代必沒有人坐在大衛的王位上；他的屍體必拋棄在外，日間受炎熱，夜間受寒霜。

en: And I will punish him and his offspring and his servants for their iniquity. I will bring upon them and upon the inhabitants of Jerusalem and upon the people of Judah all the disaster that I have pronounced against them, but they would not hear.'"
zh: 我必懲罰他和他的後裔，以及他臣僕的罪孽；我必使我對他們預告過的一切災禍，臨到他們和耶路撒冷的居民，以及猶大人的身上；他們卻不聽從。’”

en: Then Jeremiah took another scroll and gave it to Baruch the scribe, the son of Neriah, who wrote on it at the dictation of Jeremiah all the words of the scroll that Jehoiakim king of Judah had burned in the fire. And many similar words were added to them.
zh: 於是耶利米取了另一卷書卷，交給尼利亞的兒子文士巴錄；巴錄就從耶利米的口中，把猶大王約雅敬在火中燒掉的那書上的一切話，都寫在書卷上，還加上很多類似的話。
